summary: Iteration 156: Dream Realms (Procedural Loop Engine) - ALL TESTS PASSED (23/23 backend, all frontend UI verified). New features: Procedural realm generation seeded by elemental balance/birth resonance/cosmic weather, 5-rule visual distortion system (Entropy, Elemental Tinting, Decay Distortion, Geometric Fracturing, Mantra Feedback), tighten/expand mechanics, legendary frequency discoveries, decoded modifier hooks. Regression tests for Nexus and Dashboard cosmic weather widget also passed.
seed_data_creation: Active realm exists for test user with water challenges (Drought Sanctum of Flames biome). Birth resonance set (Pisces natal sign).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dream Realms feature fully implemented and tested. Backend routes at /app/backend/routes/dream_realms.py. Frontend at /app/frontend/src/pages/DreamRealms.js. Key data-testids: dream-realms-page, realm-card, escape-gauge, difficulty-badge, loop-mechanics, distortion-compositor, dream-tabs, tab-realm, tab-history, tab-legendary, history-tab, legendary-tab, challenge-{index}, complete-challenge-{index}, abandon-realm-btn, dream-back-btn, nexus-link. Biome templates: fire_excess, fire_deficient, water_excess, water_deficient, wood_excess, wood_deficient, earth_excess, earth_deficient, metal_excess, metal_deficient, balanced. Escape velocity base: 60, increases by 3 per loop iteration. Legendary frequencies discovered on loop break.

GET /api/dream-realms/active.details: Returns realm with biome (name, atmosphere, visual_distortion, colors), difficulty (difficulty, state, description, challenge_count), challenges (task, xp, harmony_boost), escape_threshold, cosmic_context (zodiac, element, natal_sign), elements_snapshot, narrative

POST /api/dream-realms/complete-challeng.details: Awards XP and dust, returns xp_awarded, dust_awarded, challenges_done, total_challenges, current_harmony, escape_threshold. Checks for loop break (harmony >= threshold) or tighten (all challenges done but harmony not met)

POST /api/dream-realms/abandon.details: Marks realm as abandoned, returns message

GET /api/dream-realms/active (after aban.details: Generates a NEW realm after abandoning previous one

GET /api/dream-realms/history.details: Returns past completed/abandoned realms with biome, status, loop_iteration, completion_harmony, legendary_discovery

GET /api/dream-realms/legendary-frequenc.details: Returns discovered frequencies with hz, name, rarity, mantra_combo, discovery_note

Auth protection.details: All 5 Dream Realms endpoints return 401/403 without authentication

Frontend Dream Realms page.details: Page loads with realm-card, escape-gauge, difficulty-badge, loop-mechanics, distortion-compositor, tabs (Active Realm, Past Loops, Discoveries)

Frontend tabs work.details: All 3 tabs switch correctly and load appropriate content

Frontend challenge cards.details: Challenge cards display with task, XP, harmony boost, and Resolve button

Frontend distortion compositor.details: 5-rule distortion system renders inside realm card (Entropy, Elemental Tinting, Decay Distortion, Geometric Fracturing, Mantra Feedback)

Nexus page regression.details: Nexus page still works correctly with harmony-gauge, element-rings, decay-freshness, birth-resonance-card

Dashboard cosmic-weather-widget regressi.details: Dashboard cosmic weather widget still renders showing Aries Season, Waxing Gibbous, AI forecast, frequency chip, XP bonus chip
